How we teach Book a lesson
Friendly DVSA-approved coaches

Calm voices, local routes, cars you’ll feel relaxed in.

Suffolk-based instructors with dual controls, patient coaching, and pick-ups that suit your week. Manual and automatic, evenings and weekends.

Meet the instructors

Pick based on area, transmission, and teaching style.

Sarah Patel

Ipswich · Automatic
Calm reassurance Anxious drivers

Gentle coaching with clear Ipswich test-route prep and soft voice prompts.

James O’Connor

Bury St Edmunds · Manual
Structured drills Roundabout confidence

Clear clutch and steering drills, early morning slots, and mock tests with kind notes.

Amelia Chen

Colchester · Manual & Auto
City traffic calm Night drives

Keeps complex junctions gentle; offers night drives and dual carriageway refreshers.

Daniel Brooks

Step-by-step Parking made simple

Breaks manoeuvres into calm micro-steps, with kind feedback after every drive.

Aisha Khan

Ipswich & Felixstowe · Automatic
Gentle pace Parking practice

Keeps lessons calm with repeatable parking markers and friendly mirror routines.

Tom Hughes

Bury St Edmunds · Manual
Mock tests Route planning

Focuses on DVSA-style marking, clear next steps, and steady roundabout timing.

View car Read bio

How we work with you

Simple, transparent, and tailored to your pace.

  • 1:1 matching on transmission, schedule, and goals
  • Two wins, two focuses after each drive for clear progress
  • Local route insight and DVSA-style marking so tests feel routine

Meet your ideal instructor

Tell us your location and availability—we’ll recommend the best Coffey’s coach for you.
